display.purpose: The save name; one per page. EB Garamond 600.

title.purpose: Section heads and fold summaries; weight + gold count, no uppercase tracking.

body.purpose: All running text and item names; +0.01em tracking for light-on-dark.

label.purpose: Slot labels, hints, meta lines, group heads in Scribe Mute.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: The only easing curve; state transitions at 180ms, entrances at 400ms.

components.name: Drop Zone
components.description: The single primary action: a dashed, keyboard-focusable file target that lights gold on attention.
components.css: .ds-drop { display: block; border: 1px dashed oklch(0.32 0.025 80); border-radius: 10px; padding: 3.25rem 1.5rem; text-align: center; cursor: pointer; color: oklch(0.91 0.025 85); background: oklch(0.17 0.012 80); font: 400 1rem/1.55 system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), background-color 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-drop:hover, .ds-drop:focus-visible { border-color: oklch(0.8 0.1 85); background: oklch(0.21 0.015 80); outline: 2px solid oklch(0.8 0.1 85); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-drop-label { display: block; font-size: 1.0625rem; } .ds-drop-or { color: oklch(0.72 0.035 83); } .ds-drop-hint { display: block; margin-top: 0.5rem; color: oklch(0.72 0.035 83); font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-drop code { font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.9em; }

components.name: Disclosure Fold
components.description: Carried/spells/mods expander with the gold chevron and count.
components.html:
Carried 27+39 sub-spells · +11 basic actions
  • Potion of Healing ×3
  • Scroll of Revivify
components.css: .ds-fold { color: oklch(0.91 0.025 85); background: oklch(0.17 0.012 80); font: 400 1rem/1.55 system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-fold > summary { cursor: pointer; list-style: none; font: 600 0.9375rem/1.3 system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 0.2rem 0; } .ds-fold > summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; } .ds-fold > summary::before { content: ''; display: inline-block; width: 0.5em; height: 0.5em; margin-right: 0.55em; border-right: 1.5px solid oklch(0.8 0.1 85); border-bottom: 1.5px solid oklch(0.8 0.1 85); transform: rotate(-45deg) translateY(-0.1em); transition: transform 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-fold[open] > summary::before { transform: rotate(45deg); } .ds-fold > div { padding: 0.5rem 0 0 1.1rem; } .ds-count { color: oklch(0.8 0.1 85); font-weight: 600; } .ds-fold-note { color: oklch(0.72 0.035 83); font-weight: 400; font-size: 0.875rem; margin-left: 0.5em; } .ds-items { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-items li { margin: 0.15rem 0; }

components.name: Equipped Row
components.description: Slot-labelled item row from the equipped grid.
components.html:
• HeadwearGrymskull Helm
  • Main HandPhalar Aluve
  • —Lute
components.css: .ds-equip { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; color: oklch(0.91 0.025 85); background: oklch(0.17 0.012 80); font: 400 1rem/1.55 system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-equip li { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 7.5rem 1fr; gap: 1rem; padding: 0.2rem 0; } .ds-slot { color: oklch(0.72 0.035 83); font-size: 0.875rem; padding-top: 0.1em; } .ds-item { overflow-wrap: anywhere; }

components.name: Character Heading
components.description: Gold serif character name with the muted player tag and meta line.
components.html:
Maiaplayer

High Elf · Fighter / Battle Master · Level 7 · 22,756 XP
components.css: .ds-char { background: oklch(0.17 0.012 80); border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.32 0.025 80); padding-top: 1.5rem; } .ds-char-name { font: 600 1.5rem/1.2 'EB Garamond', Georgia, serif; color: oklch(0.8 0.1 85); margin: 0 0 0.25rem; letter-spacing: 0.015em; } .ds-who { font: 500 0.9375rem/1 system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.72 0.035 83); letter-spacing: 0.02em; margin-left: 0.5em; } .ds-char-meta { color: oklch(0.72 0.035 83); margin: 0; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Status Line
components.description: Polite live-region status; muted for progress, ember for errors.
components.html:
Parsed QuickSave_242.lsv in 643 ms. Nothing left your machine.

Couldn't read that file (not an LSPK package). Is it a BG3 .lsv save?
components.css: .ds-status { min-height: 1.5em; margin: 1rem 0; color: oklch(0.72 0.035 83); font: 400 0.9375rem/1.55 system-ui, sans-serif; background: oklch(0.17 0.012 80); } .ds-status-error { color: oklch(0.74 0.13 28); }

narrative.overview: A scholar's instrument that reveals exact truths from a mysterious object. The player hands over an arcane artifact (a binary .lsv save) and the interface returns precise, trustworthy answers. The mysticism lives entirely in the atmosphere — a deep, warm dark and lantern gold — while the answers themselves are set with the rigor of a well-kept ledger. Committed-dark is the color strategy: the surface IS the atmosphere; gold is the revealing light.
keyCharacteristics: Committed dark: a warm near-black surface carries the whole page
One metal: gold does headings, counts, focus, and interaction — nothing else does
Two voices: a renaissance serif for names, a system sans for data
Tactile and warm: controls respond with surface light and gold edges, not shadows
Precision as flavor: exact counts, slot labels, and honest 'undetermined' states

rules.name: The Lantern Rule
rules.body: Gold is the light source, not the paint. It marks what the reader should find and never fills surfaces. If gold covers more than roughly a tenth of the screen, the room is on fire — pull it back.

rules.name: The Warm-Dark Rule
rules.body: All neutrals share the gold hue (h≈80–85) at low chroma. Pure gray and cool tints are prohibited; so is any cream/parchment body background.

rules.name: The Two Voices Rule
rules.body: The serif names things; the sans states facts. Neither borrows the other's job.

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Tracked-uppercase section kickers are prohibited. Section hierarchy is weight + gold count, set in normal case.

rules.name: The Candlelit Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest and brighten under attention. If a box-shadow appears anywhere, it is a bug.

dos: Do keep every text/background pair at 4.5:1 minimum; this system runs at 7:1+.
Do put raw internal identifiers in the mono face with the friendly label leading and the raw value in a title attribute.
Do use periods, semicolons, colons, and parentheses in UI copy — em dashes are reserved for the empty-slot placeholder glyph.
Do state degraded states plainly; honesty is the trust mechanic.
donts: Don't look like a sketchy save-upload site: no ads, no fake progress, no uploading theater, no urgency copy.
Don't do heavy skeuomorphic fantasy: no faux-leather textures, dragon filigree, parchment scroll-edges, or game-UI cosplay.
Don't drift into the generic SaaS template: no cream backgrounds, tracked-uppercase eyebrows, hero-metric cards, or identical icon grids.
Don't use box-shadows or side-stripe borders thicker than 1px.
Don't introduce a second accent color beyond gold and Ember Error.
Don't use display:none on the file input or remove focus outlines.
